prompt: A circular avatar frame for a mobile game, Easter holiday theme. The frame is a THIN decorative ring border — the ring occupies only the OUTER 25% of the image radius, leaving a LARGE EMPTY CENTER (about 65% of the total diameter) completely hollow and transparent so a portrait can show through. The thin ring is ornate golden-bronze with warm metallic sheen and floral engravings. Pink cherry blossoms, yellow daffodils, and purple tulips are arranged along the ring. Three colorful decorated Easter eggs (pastel pink, sky blue, mint green) nestle at the bottom of the ring. A small cute white bunny with pink ears sits at the top of the ring. The decorative elements hug the ring tightly and do NOT extend into the center area. Pastel color palette: gold, pink, lavender, mint green. Game UI art style, 3D render, glossy material, transparent background. ONE SINGLE circular frame, no grid, no multiple versions.
